channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Que valent les deux nouvelles offres fibre Sosh si on les confronte l’une contre l’autre : le versus Sosh Boost Fibre vs La Boîte Sosh Fibre
item.description: Sosh propose deux nouvelles offres fibre sans engagement, avec deux philosophies radicalement différentes. Laquelle est vraiment faite pour vous ?

item.title: L’Airbus A400M va pouvoir larguer 50 drones ou 12 missiles en plein vol : la transformation se confirme
item.description: Un module amovible permettant de larguer jusqu'à 50 drones ou 12 missiles de croisière depuis la soute de l'A400M Atlas est en développement. L'avion de transport militaire européen confirme sa polyvalence.

item.title: Film fans, assemble! Vote in TechRadar's blockbuster movie season poll to tell us which one you're most excited to see in mid-2026
item.description: Blockbuster movie season is almost here — and we need your help to pick a winner in our 'most anticipated new film' survey.

item.title: “The more experienced listeners are, the less bass-heavy they want the sound”: JBL is changing the way its flagship headphones sound, and I've heard the difference — here’s how I rate it
item.description: The JBL Tour One M3 just got a major update with a new sound at the fore — I spoke with JBL about the changes, and heard them for myself.

item.title: Obsessed with Tomodachi Life? You need a Nintendo Switch stylus — here are our top picks for getting creative with your Miis
item.description: Get the most out this unhinged Japanese game's many creative features.

item.title: Some good news for Elon Musk: FCC ruling means 'faster speeds, lower costs, and greater reliability' for SpaceX Starlink and other satellites
item.description: The FCC is updating the US regulations on how many internet satellites can be put into low-orbit.

item.title: This free WordPress tool could save businesses billions every year by slashing the AI tokens needed to read the web — saving enough electricity to power the entire USA for 24 hours
item.description: Free WordPress plugin could slash AI web traffic data use enough to rival daily USA electricity consumption if widely adopted.

item.title: Playing Esoteric Ebb is like rolling the dice with a great DM
item.description: It took me a while to get into Esoteric Ebb, a new CRPG from developer Christoffer Bodegård. The elevator pitch is basically Disco Elysium, but in the fantasy style of Dungeons & Dragons: You play as a cleric wandering around a small town who's trying to figure out, among other things, the mystery of why […]

item.title: The things we’re building
item.description: Hi, friends! Welcome to Installer No. 126, your guide to the best and Verge-iest stuff in the world. (If you're new here, welcome, I need 10 or 15 skirts from Calvin Klein, and also you can read all the old editions at the Installer homepage.) Happy Ruthless Self-Promotion Week! We're dedicating almost all of this […]

item.title: 'No viewfinder, no deal' — why Nikon's new rumored full-frame compact is already dividing fans
item.description: Nikon is being tipped to release a fixed-lens full-frame compact camera that could rival the Fujifilm X100VI, Ricoh GR IV, Sony RX1R III, and Leica Q3, but its rumored specs make for, let's just say, interesting reading

item.title: I'm a VPN expert, and I've been using this $2 per month VPN deal for over two years to protect my phone, computer, and TV, as well as protect my devices from viruses and data breaches — here's how you can claim it yourself
item.description: I've kept my data out of murky waters, here's how you can too

item.title: On a essayé le Genesis GV60 : pourquoi ce SUV électrique est une alternative crédible aux BMW, Audi et Volvo
item.description: Division haut de gamme de Hyundai, la marque coréenne Genesis débarque enfin en France. Fondée en 2015, elle arrive chez nous avec trois voitures électriques, dont le GV60 que nous avons pu prendre en main.

item.title: Notre sélection des 7 meilleures offres d’aspirateur robot et balais laveurs lors des French Days 2026
item.description: Vous êtes à la recherche d'un nouveau compagnon pour le ménage de votre domicile ? Lors des French Days 2026, les aspirateurs robots et les balais laveurs sont eux aussi mis en avant dans les diverses promotions. Voici les meilleures offres disponibles.

item.title: What You Need to Know About the Foreign-Made Router Ban in the US
item.description: The FCC banned the sale of new consumer-grade Wi-Fi routers and mobile hot spots manufactured outside the US. Here’s what it means for you.

item.title: Mayor of Kingstown season 5 — everything we know so far about the hit Taylor Sheridan show's final series
item.description: Mayor of Kingstown season 5 will sadly be the Taylor Sheridan show's final installment — here's everything we know so far about its Paramount+ return.

item.title: Undead co-op shooters, gorgeous hack-and-slash action and other new indie games worth checking out
item.description: Plus, more Ball x Pit is never a bad thing.
